settings.title: Settings
settings.languageHint: Default follows the system; saved to this device
settings.launchAtLoginHint: Start ClawTeam when you sign in
settings.minimizeToTrayHint: Closing the window hides to the tray instead of quitting
settings.stopAgentsOnExitHint: Stop all Gateways when quitting the app
settings.openclawCliHint: Prefers PATH or global npm/pnpm, then the app bundle. Set CLAWTEAM_FORCE_BUNDLED_OPENCLAW=1 to force bundled.
settings.openclawCliNeedsNode: This mode requires Node on PATH.
settings.openclawCliNoSystemNode: No system Node required (PATH shim or bundled runtime).
